Transformation /Business Rules /Join Con:
TAXLOT_STG_OWNER.OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT S
LEFT JOIN COMMON_OWNER.SRC_STM_DIM D
  ON S.SRC_STM_ID = D.SRC_STM_ID and get the SRC_STM_CD

Look up on TAXLOT_STG_OWNER.CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT S
LEFT OUTER JOIN  
  CCAL_REPL_OWNER.CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP PD 
  ON  PD.CCAL_PD_ID=S.CCAL_PD_ID
  AND PD.ACTV_F='Y',  pick- CIRD_PD_ID

Lookup on TAXLOT_OWNER.OPN_TAX_LOTS_NON_BKR_FACT T
  ON T.AR_ID = S.AR_ID
LEFT JOIN COMMON_OWNER.ACG_TP_DIM LK
ON LK.ACG_TP_CD =S.AC_TP_CODE
to get ACG_TP_NM

ADJ_COST,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (EXG_RATE is NULL OR EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN ADJ_COST
ELSE 
    ADJ_COST * EXG_RATE
END SBC_ADJ_COST

FMV FAIR_MKT_VAL_OF_GIFT_OR_INHTN,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (EXG_RATE is NULL OR EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN FMV
ELSE 
    FMV * EXG_RATE
END SBC_FAIR_MKT_VAL

CASE
                        WHEN (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.MISS_COST_F = 'Y' OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.null_bss_f = 'Y')
                          THEN 'Y'
                        ELSE 'N'
                     END

OPN_FCTR OPN_PRC_FCTR,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (EXG_RATE is NULL OR EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_FCTR
ELSE 
    OPN_FCTR * EXG_RATE
END SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR

Use  TAXLOT_STG_OWNER.OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT S
JOIN CCAL_REPL_OWNER.CL_VAL C
  ON S.TAX_LOT_TXN_EV_TP_ID = C.CL_VAL_ID
 AND C.CL_SCM_ID = 86  and pick CL_VAL_NM

ORIG_COST COST_AMT,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (EXG_RATE is NULL OR EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN ORIG_COST
ELSE 
    ORIG_COST * EXG_RATE
END SBC_COST_AMT

ORIG_PRC,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (EXG_RATE is NULL OR EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN ORIG_PRC
ELSE 
    ORIG_PRC * EXG_RATE
END SBC_ORIG_PRC

ORIG_PROCD,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (EXG_RATE is NULL OR EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN ORIG_PROCD
ELSE 
    ORIG_PROCD * EXG_RATE
END SBC_ORIG_PROCD
Use ORIG_TAX_LOT_TXN_TP_ID as CL_Val_id and get CL_VAL_NM
Use  SRC_RCRD_TP_ID in CL_VAL and use- CL_VAL_NM
Use TAX_LOT_TXN_TP_ID as CL_Val_id and get CL_VAL_CD where CL_SCM_ID = 84

UC,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (EXG_RATE is NULL OR EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN UC
ELSE 
    UC * EXG_RATE
END SBC_UC

UC,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (EXG_RATE is NULL OR EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN UC
ELSE 
    UC * EXG_RATE
END SBC_UC

(CASE   
WHEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.WASH_SALE_IND ='Y' 
AND OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.DISALWD_WASHSALE_AMT = 0    THEN 'CBW' 
WHEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.WASH_SALE_IND ='Y' 
AND OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.DISALWD_WASHSALE_AMT > 0    THEN 'BOTHW' 
WHEN OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.WASH_SALE_IND <> 'Y' 
AND OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.DISALWD_WASHSALE_AMT > 0    THEN 'GLW' 
END) AS WASH_SALE_TP

ADJ_COST,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (EXG_RATE is NULL OR EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN ADJ_COST
ELSE 
    ADJ_COST * EXG_RATE
END SBC_ADJ_COST

FMV FAIR_MKT_VAL_OF_GIFT_OR_INHTN,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (EXG_RATE is NULL OR EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN FMV
ELSE 
    FMV * EXG_RATE
END SBC_FAIR_MKT_VAL

OPN_FCTR OPN_PRC_FCTR,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (EXG_RATE is NULL OR EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN OPN_FCTR
ELSE 
    OPN_FCTR * EXG_RATE
END SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR

ORIG_COST COST_AMT,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (EXG_RATE is NULL OR EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN ORIG_COST
ELSE 
    ORIG_COST * EXG_RATE
END SBC_COST_AMT

ORIG_PRC,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (EXG_RATE is NULL OR EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN ORIG_PRC
ELSE 
    ORIG_PRC * EXG_RATE
END SBC_ORIG_PRC

ORIG_PROCD,
case when (CCY_CODE ='USD' or (EXG_RATE is NULL OR EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN ORIG_PROCD
ELSE 
    ORIG_PROCD * EXG_RATE
END SBC_ORIG_PROCD
Use SRC_STM_ID to get name

Use OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.ACG_TP_CODE 
to get ACG_TP_ID

(case when TAXLOT_DTL_OPN.CVRD_UNCVRD = 'C' then 'Y'
else 'N'
end) AS COST_BSS_LEGS_CVR_F

CASE
                          WHEN (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.RVST_F<>'Y' AND (OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.MISS_COST_F = 'Y' OR OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT.null_bss_f = 'Y'))
                            THEN 'Y'
                            ELSE 'N'
                    END
